Item.Text: [P1C52]PFC voltage control failure or AC input over voltage.
[P1C53]PFC voltage control failure or AC input over voltage.
[P1C54]PFC control failure. (Loss of ability to control Power Facter Correction)
[P1C5B]AC inpur failure or OBC AC fuse railure.
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: FFD_$0106_#004_bit0_ACCUMULATION ABNORMALITY STOP NUMBER OF TIMES

Item.Text: OUT OF THE DC CHARGE MODE(0h)

Data.Name: FFD_$0139_#004_bit0_DISCHARGE UPPER LIMIT CURRENT ORDER VALUE
DataRead_$0107.FFD_$0107_#005_bit1_INPUT CURRENT Zero Point Confirmation flag

Item.Text: OUT OF THE AC CHARGE MODE(0h)

Request.Name: DataRead.FFD_$0106_#004_bit0_ACCUMULATION ABNORMALITY STOP NUMBER OF TIMES

DataItem.Name: FFD_$0106_#004_bit0_ACCUMULATION ABNORMALITY STOP NUMBER OF TIMES
DataRead_$0107.FFD_$0107_#005_bit1_INPUT CURRENT Zero Point Confirmation flag

Request.Name: DataRead.FFD_$0139_#004_bit0_DISCHARGE UPPER LIMIT CURRENT ORDER VALUE

DataItem.Name: FFD_$0139_#004_bit0_DISCHARGE UPPER LIMIT CURRENT ORDER VALUE

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Device.Name: [P1C52]PFC voltage control failure or AC input over voltage.
[P1C53]PFC voltage control failure or AC input over voltage.
[P1C5B]AC inpur failure or OBC AC fuse railure.
[P1C54]PFC control failure. (Loss of ability to control Power Facter Correction)
